schema.description: Research each player's status as of 2026-07-12 and fill these fields. Do NOT change id or name. Save the completed file(s) as data/research_patches/patch_NN.json with the same {id, ...} objects.

fields.id: int - players_db id, unchanged (join key, do not edit)
fields.name: string - unchanged, for human reference
fields.current_team: the club's COMMON name as of July 2026 (e.g. 'Real Madrid', 'Inter Miami', 'Al-Nassr'). For a RETIRED player, their LAST professional club. Name normalisation to the app's official club string happens automatically at apply time -- just give the common name.
fields.league: for ACTIVE players, one of known_leagues below (the club's current league). For RETIRED players LEAVE THIS OUT / null -- their last league is kept automatically; do NOT write 'Retired'.
fields.market_value_eur: integer euros, 0..300000000; use 0 for retired players
fields.retired_year: integer year if retired, otherwise null

notes: current_team is normalised at apply time; unresolvable clubs are logged to research_patches/unresolved_clubs.json and skipped (other fields still apply).
league is never set to 'Retired' or any new string -- retirement is carried by status + retired_year.

players.name: Philippe Coutinho
players.current_team: Clube De Regatas Vasco Da Gama
